hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),cp=require('child_process'),path=require('path');const p='.claude/skills/finance-skills';if(fs.existsSync(p))fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true});cp.execSync('git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/himself65/finance-skills.git '+p,{stdio:'inherit'});const pd=path.join(p,'plugins');for(const g of fs.readdirSync(pd)){const sd=path.join(pd,g,'skills');if(!fs.existsSync(sd))continue;for(const s of fs.readdirSync(sd)){const dst='.claude/skills/'+s;if(fs.existsSync(dst))fs.rmSync(dst,{recursive:true,force:true});cp.execSync('cp -r '+path.join(sd,s)+' '+dst,{stdio:'inherit'});console.log('installed skill: '+s);}}const od='.claude/skill-overrides';if(fs.existsSync(od)){for(const s of fs.readdirSync(od)){const src=path.join(od,s);const dst=path.join('.claude/skills',s);if(!fs.existsSync(dst))fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(src)){fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,f),path.join(dst,f));console.log('applied override: '+s+'/'+f);}}}else{console.log('no skill-overrides found');}" 2>&1
